dict.string: Haven lets you add a song to a post; it plays through your own Apple Music.
Haven uses Bluetooth to share posts directly with nearby people in your circle when you're offline.
Haven uses the camera so you can capture photos and videos to share with your circle. Nothing is uploaded — media is encrypted on your device first.
Haven uses Touch ID to unlock circles you've chosen to lock, so only you can open them.
Haven finds people in your circle who are nearby so it can share posts directly over Wi-Fi and Bluetooth — even with no internet.
Haven uses your location only when you choose to pin and share a spot on a map with your circle. It's never tracked or uploaded otherwise.
Haven uses the microphone to record sound with your videos.
Haven can save photos and videos you share or receive to your Photos library, so they're ready when you open Photos.
Haven lets you pick photos and videos from your library to share privately with your circle.
